^(batch_policy_group_names)$.description: Same as batch_policy_names, for policy groups created/updated in the same batch.

^(batch_policy_names)$.description:
Names of policies created/updated in the same batch apply. References to these are
 treated as known instead of being resolved against the registry (they may not be
 persisted yet, e.g. during dry-run). Remote references are still validated.

^(dry_run)$.description: When true, validate and compute the result without persisting any change

^(raw_schema)$.description: Raw representation of the contract in json, yaml or cue
